free_text: Measurement of the entry-spin distribution imparted
to the high excitation continuum region of gadolinium
about enriched samples used in present experiment.
The experiments were carried out at
the 88-Inch Cyclotron at Lawrence Berkeley National
particles were measured using Si telescope consisting
of 140 mu-m dE Si-strip detector and 1000 mu-m thick
Si-strip E detectors. The angular range of
both detectors was 36 - 62 deg. The p-side of these
detectors are segmented into 48 concentric rings each
0.5mm thick. The n-side has 16 wedge-shaped sectors
Coincident gamma rays were detected using an
array of five Compton-suppressed clover Ge detectors of
the Livermore Berkeley Array for Collaborative
Deuterons were identified using E-dE method
